structured_content.response:
The process for `process_rule_id 'J09B'` has been executed end-to-end:

- All relevant `J09B` rows were copied into `J09B_temp` and classified with `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using the specified HAUS/EQUNR and address/house-number rules.
- The data was joined with `EABLG`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `NET_MASTER`.
- Customer data was selected per row using the defined XOR logic (prefer `SALES_MASTER` when present, otherwise `NET_MASTER`).
- The final dataset was exported to CSV as `J09B.csv` with exactly the required columns and order.
- An email with the CSV attached was sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- All temporary tables (`J09B_temp`, `J09B_enriched`, `J09B_joined`, `J09B_final`) have been dropped.

If you‚Äôd like, I can show you the first few rows of the exported dataset or adjust any of the classification/join rules for a rerun.

kwargs.content:
The process with `process_rule_id 'J09B'` has been fully executed. Summary of what was done:

- Copied all relevant `J09B` rows into `J09B_temp` and classified them with `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using the HAUS/EQUNR and address/house-number rules.
- Joined the data with `EABLG`, `SALES_MASTER`, and `NET_MASTER`.
- Selected customer data for each row using XOR logic: prefer `SALES_MASTER` when present; otherwise use `NET_MASTER`.
- Exported the resulting data to `J09B.csv` with the required columns and order.
- Emailed the CSV file to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped all temporary tables: `J09B_temp`, `J09B_enriched`, `J09B_joined`, and `J09B_final`.

Tell me if you want to:
- Inspect or preview the resulting CSV (e.g., first 10 rows or specific columns).
- Modify any classification/join rules and rerun the process.
